title: The-Purgatory.Net Admin Data Pack
description: A small Data Pack that allows you to take control over admin on your server
body:
# The-Purgatory\.net Data Pack
features the abilaty to give staff a chance to help out without giveing them op
Toggable commands Allowing smooth transition from admin mode to normal


## Commands And Uses
-  trigger Admin allows you to enter admin mode and Gain accsess to all trigger commands
-  trigger Admin_Tools Gives You Op Items That may or may not be usefull to an admin
-  trigger Disguise Gives you the abilaty to hide as a mob and controll them
-  trigger Freeze_Player gives you an item where if placed next to a player freezes them
-  trigger Unfreeze_Player Gives you An item where if placed next to a player uinfreezes them
-  trigger Ghost give you the abilaty to faze throw blocks while in creative and have full controll while doing so 
-  trigger god_Mode makes you invincable
-  trigger help_me is a command any players can trigger and it will notifi an admin a player needs help
-  trigger help is the command an admin can use if they want to go to any  player that needs help
-  trigger vanish as it sounds makes you invisable 
-  trigger weather-Toggle will toggle all the wether types in a row 

All commoands are on a switch setting so you use the trigger command once to enable and once to disable


### setup 
Add A repeating Command Block to your world with the command 
/function admin:run_me
And Set to allways active

All you have to do is in chat put
/tag @s add Admin
And if you want to add a staff member just replace player_Name with there name
/tag Player_Name add Admin
